zh.Hohenpfirt, Ferrette, Haut-Rhin, Alsace,: 法國阿爾薩斯豪吉爾霍恩普費爾特
zh.Pfirt, Alsace, France: 法國阿爾薩斯豪吉爾費瑞迪
zh.lifeSummary: Agnes de Vergy是Hugues de Vergy的女兒，於大約1235年出生在瑞士阿高可林瑙。她於1253年10月與Theobald de Ferrette I在瑞士阿高可林瑙結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1286年8月9日在法國豪吉爾費瑞迪享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes de Vergy是Hugues de Vergy的女儿，于大约1235年出生在瑞士阿高可林瑙。她于1253年10月与Theobald de Ferrette I在瑞士阿高可林瑙结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1286年8月9日在法国豪吉爾費瑞迪享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vergy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Herefordshire): nickname from Middle English verrei, verie ‘true; reliable, trustworthy’ (Old French verai).

Irish: variant of McVerry, a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fearadhaigh, itself an unlenited and subsequently voiced variant of Mac Fhearadhaigh, ‘son of Fearadhach’, a personal name meaning ‘manly’. Compare McAree and McCary ; also the surnames Ferry and Farry , from Ó Fearadhaigh.
History: The widow Bridget Very settled with her children in Salem, MA, c. 1634. She had many prominent descendants, including the poet Jones Very (1813–1880).

variants.name: McAree
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhearadhaigh ‘son of Fearadhach’, a personal name meaning ‘manly’ (from fear ‘man’). Pronunciation of this name as McAree led to misinterpretation as Mac an Rí ‘son of the king’ and thus to ‘translation’ as King . See McGarry .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Agnes de Vergy was born about 1235, in Klingnau, Aargau, Switzerland as the daughter of Hugues de Vergy. She married Theobald de Ferrette I in October 1253, in Klingnau, Aargau, Switzerland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 9 August 1286, in Ferrette, Haut-Rhin, France, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes de Vergy est née environ 1235, à Klingnau, Argovie, Suisse, fille de Hugues de Vergy. Elle a épousé Theobald de Ferrette I en octobre 1253, à Klingnau, Argovie, Suisse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 août 1286, à Ferrette, Haut-Rhin, France, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes de Vergy wurde um 1235 in Klingnau, Aargau, Schweiz, als Tochter von Hugues de Vergy geboren. Sie hat im Oktober 1253 in Klingnau, Aargau, Schweiz Theobald de Ferrette I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. August 1286 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Pfirt, Haut-Rhin, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes de Vergy è nata il circa 1235 nel Klingnau, Argovia, Svizzera come figlia di Hugues de Vergy. Lei sposato Theobald de Ferrette I nel ottobre 1253, nel Klingnau, Argovia, Svizzera. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 9 agosto 1286, nel Ferrette, Haut-Rhin, Francia, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Vergyは約1235年にスイスアールガウクリングナウでHugues de Vergyの娘として生まれた。1253年10月にスイスアールガウクリングナウでTheobald de Ferrette Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1286年8月9日にフランスハウト-ルヒンフエレットで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Vergy(은)는 대략 1235년 스위스 아아르가 클링나에서 Hugues de Vergy의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1253년 10월 스위스 아아르가 클링나에서 Theobald de Ferrette I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1286년 8월 9일 프랑스 하트-히 페렛에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes de Vergy nasceu aproximadamente 1235, em Klingnau, Aargau, Suiça filha de Hugues de Vergy. Ela casou-se com Theobald de Ferrette I em outubro de 1253, em Klingnau, Aargau, Suiça. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de agosto de 1286, em Ferrette, Haut-Rhin, França, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes de Vergy родилась около 1235 г. в местности клингнау, ааргау, Швейцария. Её отца звали Hugues de Vergy. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Theobald de Ferrette I октябрь 1253 г. в местности клингнау, ааргау, Швейцария. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 9 августа 1286 г. в местности фирретт, хаут-рин, Франция в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes de Vergy nació aproximadamente 1235, en Klingnau, Aargau, Suiza como hija de Hugues de Vergy. Se casó con Theobald de Ferrette I en octubre de 1253, en Klingnau, Aargau, Suiza. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 9 de agosto de 1286, en Ferrette, Haut-Rhin, Francia, a la edad de 52 años.
